moments.title: F1 British Grand Prix at Silverstone
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 British Grand Prix kicks off today at Silverstone, with practice sessions and sprint qualifying, leading up to the main race on Sunday.

angles.name: Race Weekend Kick-off
angles.copy: Start your engines! The British Grand Prix weekend is officially underway at Silverstone. Who are you backing for pole position today?

angles.name: Home Race Excitement
angles.copy: It's race day weekend! The F1 British Grand Prix is live from Silverstone. Get ready for a thrilling few days of high-speed action and drama.

moments.title: Wimbledon Enters Second Week
moments.blurb: The Championships at Wimbledon are in full swing, with the tournament now heading into its crucial second week, culminating in the finals on July 12th.

angles.name: Second Week Action
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream are still on the menu as Wimbledon enters its second, thrilling week! Who's your pick to reach the finals?

angles.name: Road to the Finals
angles.copy: The tension is building at SW19! We're deep into Wimbledon now. Which players are showing championship form and heading for glory?

moments.title: Tour de France Begins in Barcelona
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France begins tomorrow, July 4th, with the Grand Départ in Barcelona, featuring a team time trial.

angles.name: Grand Départ Anticipation
angles.copy: The greatest show on two wheels starts tomorrow! The Tour de France kicks off in Barcelona. Who's your early favourite for the Yellow Jersey?

angles.name: Cycling Fever
angles.copy: Get ready for three weeks of epic cycling! The Tour de France begins tomorrow, promising thrills, spills, and incredible scenery.

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Top UK Chart
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean remain at number one on the Official UK Singles Chart with 'Rein Me In'.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Still reigning supreme! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean hold onto the Official UK Singles Chart Number 1 spot with 'Rein Me In'. Are you loving it?

angles.name: New Music Moment
angles.copy: The latest UK Singles Chart is out! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are still at the top. What else is making waves in the Top 40?

moments.title: UK Schools Break for Summer
moments.blurb: Many schools across the UK, including Northern Ireland and parts of England and Wales, are now starting their summer holidays, marking the official start of the summer break for many families.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: The school gates are officially closed for summer! For many, the summer holidays begin now. What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Summer Break Begins
angles.copy: No more school runs for a while! It's the start of the summer holidays for many kids across the UK. Wishing everyone a fantastic break!

moments.title: Pete Tong Turns 60
moments.blurb: Legendary DJ and producer Pete Tong celebrates his 60th birthday today, July 3rd, 2026.

angles.name: DJ Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 60th Birthday to the one and only Pete Tong! A true icon of dance music, still bringing us the biggest tunes. What's your favourite set or track?

angles.name: It's All Gone Pete Tong
angles.copy: Wishing a massive happy 60th birthday to the legendary Pete Tong! Still an essential voice in dance music. Here's to many more years!

moments.title: Post Malone Turns 31
moments.blurb: American rapper, singer, and songwriter Post Malone celebrates his 31st birthday tomorrow, July 4th, 2026.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Tomorrow, Post Malone turns 31! From 'Rockstar' to 'Circles', he's given us so many hits. What's your go-to Posty track?

angles.name: Celebrating Posty
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Post Malone's 31st birthday is tomorrow. Drop your favourite lyrics or memories of his music!

moments.title: Huey Lewis Turns 76
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, celebrates his 76th birthday on July 5th, 2026.

angles.name: 80s Icon Birthday
angles.copy: It's hip to be square! Wishing a very happy 76th birthday to the fantastic Huey Lewis on Sunday. What's your favourite hit from Huey Lewis and the News?

angles.name: Power of Love
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to the legendary Huey Lewis on July 5th! From 'The Power of Love' to 'Stuck With You', his songs are timeless. Which one gets you singing?

moments.title: 50 Cent Turns 51
moments.blurb: American rapper, actor, and businessman 50 Cent celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6th, 2026.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Mogul Birthday
angles.copy: Go shorty, it's your birthday! 50 Cent turns 51 on Monday. What's your favourite track from the G-Unit boss?

angles.name: Get Rich or Die Tryin'
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to 50 Cent on July 6th! From chart-topping hits to TV success, he's done it all. What's your favourite 50 Cent moment?

moments.title: Ringo Starr Turns 86
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th, 2026.

angles.name: Beatles Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Peace and love! Wishing a very happy 86th birthday to the iconic Ringo Starr on Tuesday. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo on drums or vocals?

angles.name: Fab Four Drummer
angles.copy: Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr on July 7th! A true rock and roll legend. Send him your love!

moments.title: Trying Season 5 Premieres
moments.blurb: The fifth season of the popular British comedy-drama 'Trying' premieres on Apple TV+ on July 8th, continuing the story of Nikki and Jason's adoption journey.

angles.name: New Season Alert
angles.copy: Get ready for more laughs and heartwarming moments! 'Trying' Season 5 lands on Apple TV+ on Wednesday. Who's excited to see what's next for Nikki and Jason?

angles.name: British Comedy Back
angles.copy: One of our favourite British comedies is back! 'Trying' Season 5 premieres July 8th on Apple TV+. Time to catch up if you haven't seen it yet!

moments.title: Ann Droid Comedy on BBC
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan stars in 'Ann Droid', a new quirky BBC comedy about a grieving widow and her eldercare robot, premiering July 11th.

angles.name: Diane Morgan's New Show
angles.copy: Diane Morgan is back with a new comedy! 'Ann Droid' premieres on BBC on July 11th. Expect dry wit and an unlikely friendship. Will you be watching?

angles.name: New BBC Comedy
angles.copy: A brand new British comedy is coming to the BBC on July 11th! 'Ann Droid' looks set to be a quirky and clever watch. Who's tuning in?

moments.title: The Dark Thriller on ITV
moments.blurb: A new moody thriller, 'The Dark', starring Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale, premieres on ITV and ITVX on July 12th.

angles.name: New ITV Thriller
angles.copy: Get ready to be on the edge of your seat! The new thriller 'The Dark' starts on ITV and ITVX on July 12th. Perfect for a gripping Monday night.

angles.name: Scottish Wilderness Mystery
angles.copy: A new mystery unfolds in the Scottish wilderness. 'The Dark' comes to ITV on July 12th. Who's ready for a moody, intense drama?

moments.title: Roger McGuinn Turns 84
moments.blurb: Roger McGuinn, co-founder of the influential folk-rock band The Byrds, celebrates his 84th birthday on July 13th, 2026.

angles.name: Folk-Rock Pioneer Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to the legendary Roger McGuinn from The Byrds on July 13th! His Rickenbacker sound shaped a generation. What's your favourite Byrds track?

angles.name: Mr Tambourine Man
angles.copy: A true icon of the 60s! Roger McGuinn of The Byrds turns 84 on Monday. Celebrate with some classic folk-rock!

moments.title: The Open Championship Practice Days
moments.blurb: Practice days for The 154th Open Championship begin on July 12th at Royal Birkdale, ahead of the main tournament starting on July 16th.

angles.name: Golf Major Warm-up
angles.copy: The world's best golfers head to Royal Birkdale next week as practice days begin for The Open Championship on July 12th. Who are you hoping to see lift the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Road to Royal Birkdale
angles.copy: Counting down to The Open! Practice rounds start next week at Royal Birkdale. Get ready for golf's oldest major!
